visual_description: The camera pans across a city skyline at night, focusing on the illuminated facade of the Mandarin Oriental hotel. The surrounding skyscrapers are dark, with only a few scattered lights visible in their windows. Streetlights below cast a glow on the scene, creating a contrast between the bright building and the dark cityscape.
audio_description: A dramatic, orchestral musical score plays, featuring prominent brass instruments and a sense of urgency or tension.
